title: citrus × georgiana
intro: Citrus × georgiana is a rare and endangered hybrid of citrus plant, believed to be a cross between a sour orange and a lemon. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its high concentration of limonene, a compound with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Citrus × georgiana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Citrus × georgiana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its uses and potential benefits.
